subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned unto God and believed in His signs which have encompassed all the worlds. Blessed is the servant who hath attained unto this light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الله و آمن بایاته التی احاطت العالمین طوبی لعبد فاز بهذا النور
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
